prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: PRF-PFTGMBH-SML-ORNG-2 Product Type: ABIS_BOOK Brand (from catalog): Productive Fitness Existing Title: Productive Fitness The Great Medicine Ball Handbook Description: The Productive Fitness Great Medicine Ball Handbook is a valuable resource for athletes and fitness enthusiasts.

This handbook features 55 medicine ball exercises for individual or partner training. The exercises are clearly explained and illustrated with colorful photos.

The book also includes muscle anatomy diagrams, a section on stretching and key rotator cuff exercises.

The handbook is printed in color and has 64 pages. Make sure to grab this handbook before you start using medicine balls. Search Terms: personal trainer gym equipment exercise muscle groups workout Features: - 55 Exercises for Individual & Partner Training === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Productive Fitness The Great Medicine Ball Handbook

openai.item_name: Productive Fitness Great Medicine Ball Handbook

anthropic.title_differentiation: 55 Exercises, Individual And Partner Training, Muscle Anatomy Diagrams, Stretching Guide, 64 Pages, Full Color

openai.title_differentiation: 55 Exercises, Individual And Partner Training, Color Photos, Muscle Anatomy, Stretching, Rotator Cuff
